sections.title: Getting Around NYC
sections.summary: The subway is usually the fastest way to move around NYC alone. In 2026, OMNY is the standard tap-to-pay system: use the same card or phone each time so your fares count toward the weekly cap.
bullets: Subway and local bus fare is $3 per ride, with OMNY fare capping after 12 paid rides in a 7-day period.
MetroCard sales and refills ended on January 1, 2026, so most visitors should use contactless payment.
Look for blue Help Point intercoms in stations: red is for emergencies, green is for information.
Rideshare or a yellow taxi is worth it late at night, with luggage, or when a route requires awkward transfers.
